apply.message: You may only place TNT here!

message.title: `lTutorial
message.subtitle: `8`l- `7Every second your `axp meter `7ticks down. If it reaches `czero `7you `cinstantly die`7! `8`l-

message.title: `lTutorial
message.subtitle: `8`l- `dKill enemy players `7or find `6time powerups `7to refill your `axp meter`7. `8`l-
